title: Materials Beyond Vanilla
description: Expands the ore selection with powerful and unique ores!
body:
An immersive expansion to Minecraft's ores with unique ores out of my and other people's imaginations! Each ore has its respective armor and tool. here's info about the current ores.



### Voidsteel

Voidsteel is one of the most powerful,  durable ore in all of minecraft. It's made of bits of bedrock with some void essence inside, hence, it can only be found at the bottom of the overworld. If you manage to find any, it will be worth it. It requires at least a diamond pickaxe to mine.



_Note! Mod is currently in beta and many features are unfinished. I will try to update as quickly as i can!_

(planned ores for soon updates: crimsontanium, sceptri)



if you have any ore suggestions, let me know in the comments!



enjoy!
